title: Large Meals
description: Adds new creative recipes to Farmer's Delight. Originally by LostWiz08
body:
![Large Meals banner](https://i.postimg.cc/Yq1636Vy/banner.png)

Adds new creative recipes to Farmer's Delight.

**Added food:**
- Rack of Mutton
- Pufferfish Broth
- Potato Soup
- Red Soup
- Tomato Egg Soup
- Cod Deluxe
- Hearty Lunch
- Chicken Curry
- Pasta with Mushroom Sauce
- Omurice
- Mushroom Pot Pie
- Sweet Berry Custard
- Rice Pudding

![Screenshot of some of the added content](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/507/148/2022-10-16_21.png)

Port of LostWiz08's LargeMeals to NeoForge 1.21.1+ under the MIT License.
